name: Italian Potato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the potatoes with salted water and boil until tender. Drain.
2. Mash the potatoes.
3. Stir in softened butter, sour cream, chives (if using), seasoned salt, and pepper.
4. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
5. Butter and lightly flour a 9 1/2-inch deep pie plate.
6. Spread the mashed potatoes in the pie plate.
7. Arrange 6 oz Mozzarella cheese on top of the potatoes.
8. Top with tomatoes, basil, and oregano.
9. Sprinkle with remaining Mozzarella cheese, Parmesan, and melted butter.
10. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until the cheese is melted. Cool slightly before cutting.
